model.name: endpointValidator
model.title: Endpoint Validator
model.description: Uses a Camel endpoint to perform data type validation by sending the message through the endpoint
model.label: validation

ref.description: Reference of the Endpoint used for validation.

uri.description: URI of the Endpoint used for validation.

type.description: The data type name to validate. If you specify 'xml:XYZ', the validator is picked up when message type is 'xml:XYZ'. If you specify just 'xml', the validator matches all xml message types.
